_note: CANONICAL CATALOG (schema cig-catalog/1, see docs/CIG_DATA_MODEL.md). PLACEHOLDER DEMO DATA — replace every TODO with real Proud Mary info before any real use. Coffee identities (names/origins/process) are REAL current PM lots from their live menu as of Jul 2026; the DIAL-IN NUMBERS are illustrative starting points, NOT PM's actual house recipes. Entities: house, tiers, locations, producers, recipes (shared house presets), coffees. References are by id; build.py resolves them into flat runtime records. This file must always work standalone from plain JSON — commerce systems (Toast, Unleashed) are optional build-time adapters, never dependencies.

coffees.name: Honduras · La Salvaje · Geisha (DEMO)

espresso.grinder: EK43 ~9.5 / Mythos fine-of-medium — ILLUSTRATIVE starting point, dial to taste

coffees.dialinNote: Delicate Geisha — protect the florals: err lighter/brighter. Every new bag drifts 4–6s; re-dial. Sour = grind finer; bitter = grind coarser. (Numbers are a starting point, not PM's official recipe.)

coffees.name: Panama Geisha (DEMO)
coffees.dialinNote: Every new bag drifts — expect a 4–6s shift in shot time and re-dial. Sour = grind finer; bitter = grind coarser.
